=== Metadata ===
Effect version: 3.19.19

/.src/missingReturnYieldStar.ts(5,28): suggestion TS377014: You are returning an Effect-able type inside a generator function, and will result in nested Effect<Effect<...>>.
Maybe you wanted to return yield* instead?
Nested Effect-able types may be intended if you plan to later manually flatten or unwrap this Effect, if so you can safely disable this diagnostic for this line through quickfixes. effect(returnEffectInGen)
/.src/missingReturnYieldStar.ts(12,7): error TS377006: It is recommended to use return yield* for Effects that never succeed to signal a definitive exit point for type narrowing and tooling support. effect(missingReturnYieldStar)
/.src/missingReturnYieldStar.ts(19,5): error TS377006: It is recommended to use return yield* for Effects that never succeed to signal a definitive exit point for type narrowing and tooling support. effect(missingReturnYieldStar)
/.src/missingReturnYieldStar.ts(20,5): error TS377006: It is recommended to use return yield* for Effects that never succeed to signal a definitive exit point for type narrowing and tooling support. effect(missingReturnYieldStar)


==== /.src/missingReturnYieldStar.ts (4 errors) ====
    // @effect-v3
    import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"
    
    export const shouldNotComplain = Effect.gen(function*() {
      if (Math.random() < 0.5) return Effect.succeed(42)
                               ~~~~~~
!!! suggestion TS377014: You are returning an Effect-able type inside a generator function, and will result in nested Effect<Effect<...>>.
Maybe you wanted to return yield* instead?
Nested Effect-able types may be intended if you plan to later manually flatten or unwrap this Effect, if so you can safely disable this diagnostic for this line through quickfixes. effect(returnEffectInGen)
      return yield* Effect.fail("no.")
    })
    
    export const shouldComplain = (n: number) =>
      Effect.gen(function*() {
        if (n === 0) {
          yield* Effect.fail("no zero!")
          ~~~~~
!!! error TS377006: It is recommended to use return yield* for Effects that never succeed to signal a definitive exit point for type narrowing and tooling support. effect(missingReturnYieldStar)
        }
        return n / 1
      })
    
    export const shouldComplainOther = (n: number) =>
      Effect.gen(function*() {
        yield* Effect.interrupt
        ~~~~~
!!! error TS377006: It is recommended to use return yield* for Effects that never succeed to signal a definitive exit point for type narrowing and tooling support. effect(missingReturnYieldStar)
        yield* Effect.die("lol")
        ~~~~~
!!! error TS377006: It is recommended to use return yield* for Effects that never succeed to signal a definitive exit point for type narrowing and tooling support. effect(missingReturnYieldStar)
        return n / 1
      })
    
    export const shouldNotComplainThrows = Effect.gen(function*() {
      throw yield* Effect.fail(42)
      return 42
    })
